title: Pastek's Lucky Block
description: A lucky block mod, made for high compatibility and easy editing.
body:
![Pastek's Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28629cc286efdefc73aa361a3cf168444e587ca8.png)

_A classic Lucky Block mod with traps, awfull and great loot to spice up your game. You can either craft those lucky blocks with eight gold ingots and quartz or a watermelon slice, or find them in your world, and simply break it to gamble your way through your survival game._

![Swamp Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3feebf8f8cf3b4c6345242d7838fbcab3e3942e1_0.webp)

**This mod has a default compatibility with the following mods :**
- Create
- Corail Tombstone
- Alex's Mobs
- Aquamirae
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Cold Sweat
- Farmer's Delight
- Eureka! Ships!
- Artifacts
- Relics
- Immersive Engineering
- Electrodynamics
- Nuclear Science
- Chemical Science
- Modular Force Fields
- Ballistix
- Assembly Line
- Cobblemon
- Alex's Caves
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Moog's Voyager Structures
- Ad Astra
- Per Spatium
- When Dungeons Arise
- When Dungeons Arise - Seven Seas
- Repurposed Structures
- Towns And Towers

For help with adding your own mod compatibility or configuring the mod, visit the [curseforge mod page](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pasteks-lucky-block).

Translation for english and french

You're of course free to use this mod in your modpack without credits or anything.

For questions, suggestions or anything :
Discord : roi_pasteque
